headline: AppLovin (APP) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of mobile app technology company AppLovin (NASDAQ:APP) jumped 3.6% in the afternoon session after reports indicated a major competitor, Meta Platforms, is not expected to bid on certain mobile advertising traffic, potentially opening up more of the market for AppLovin.

headline: Why Shares of AppLovin Were Soaring Today
summary: Meta apparently bowed out from competing for a key source of the company's business.

headline: Axon Is About To Explode Higher
summary: Axon's transformation into a full-stack public safety platform, led by the AI Era Plan, is driving higher ARPU. Read why I rate AXON stock a Buy.
